description: Google Cloud Billing lets organizations manage billing accounts, project-to-billing-account links, budgets, and pricing information for Google Cloud services. It is part of Google Cloud’s cost and usage management tooling.
summary: Google Cloud Billing exposes three REST APIs documented under Cloud Billing (core Billing, Budget, and Pricing) plus the `gcloud billing` CLI; all require Google Cloud authentication via OAuth 2.0 access tokens/ADC.
